m := 3;
n := 9;
g := 46;
F<z>:=CyclotomicField(3);
R<u,v>:=PolynomialRing(F,2);

246120)*u^27 + (-6545736*z - 1181220)*u^26 + (-8352882*z - 2581261)*u^25 + (-9593406*z - 4130322)*u^24 + (-10538100*z - 5207064)*u^23 + (-12016122*z - 4879182)*u^22 + (-14079519*z - 2050761)*u^21 + (-15141798*z + 4070724)*u^20 + (-13342482*z + 13163958)*u^19 + (-8692938*z + 23075166)*u^18 + (-3471615*z + 30174897)*u^17 + (-396954*z + 31392317)*u^16 + (-225576*z + 26582592)*u^15 + (-1450260*z + 18587136)*u^14 + (-2333702*z + 10773420)*u^13 + (-2380524*z + 5014473)*u^12 + (-1909644*z + 1672926)*u^11 + (-1289316*z + 256382)*u^10 + (-747066*z - 84717)*u^9 + (-369993*z - 66348)*u^8 + (-153020*z - 22260)*u^7 + (-50484*z - 6804)*u^6 + (-12144*z - 1854)*u^5 + (-1766*z - 436)*u^4 + (-84*z - 84)*u^3 + (-12*z - 12)*u^2 + (-z - 1)*u)*v^6 + ((-10*z - 10)*u^37 + (-115*z - 115)*u^36 + (-570*z - 570)*u^35 + (-1690*z - 1690)*u^34 + (-3325*z - 3325)*u^33 + (-3390*z - 3885)*u^32 + (4764*z - 1946)*u^31 + (36744*z - 4616)*u^30 + (123030*z - 33750)*u^29 + (315420*z - 1058475)*u^17 + (2363232*z - 2182390)*u^16 + (1317504*z - 2628796)*u^15 + (781740*z - 2316120)*u^14 + (539940*z - 1618895)*u^13 + (385050*z - 920780)*u^12 + (261432*z - 408240)*u^11 + (162532*z - 126126)*u^10 + (90430*z - 20475)*u^9 + 44085*z*u^8 + 18250*z*u^7 + 6106*z*u^6 + 1491*z*u^5 + 210*z*u^4)*v^5 + ((-4*z - 4)*u^37 + (-35*z - 35)*u^36 + (-142*z - 142)*u^35 + (-406*z - 406)*u^34 + (-890*z - 890)*u^33 + (-1564*z - 1729)*u^32 + (-2160*z - 3920)*u^31 + (-2112*z - 10252)*u^30 + (-696*z - 22946)*u^29 + (2130*z - 40210)*u^28 + (3612*z - 57344)*u^27 + (-6420*z - 68440)*u^26 + (-50328*z - 69967)*u^25 + (-151749*z - 62936)*u^24 + (-299484*z - 54220)*u^23 + (-441384*z - 54974)*u^22 + (-546924*z - 76225)*u^21 + (-630564*z - 120992)*u^20 + (-696588*z - 175066)*u^19 + (-718500*z - 202730)*u^18 + (-656088*z - 162304)*u^17 + (-503565*z - 50860)*u^16 + (-322824*z + 68752)*u^15 + (-187332*z + 126236)*u^14 + (-109050*z + 118534)*u^13 + (-62814*z + 82736)*u^12 + (-35160*z + 44044)*u^11 + (-18752*z + 16380)*u^10 + (-9316*z + 3276)*u^9 - 4205*z*u^8 - 1664*z*u^7 - 550*z*u^6 - 137*z*u^5 - 21*z*u^4)*v^4 + ((-z - 1)*u^37 + (-6*z - 6)*u^36 + (-24*z - 24)*u^35 + (-74*z - 74)*u^34 + (-195*z - 195)*u^33 + (-456*z - 501)*u^32 + (-976*z - 1326)*u^31 + (-1944*z - 3054)*u^30 + (-3654*z - 5709)*u^29 + (-6540*z - 9240)*u^28 + (-11232*z - 13416)*u^27 + (-18612*z - 18096)*u^26 + (-29082*z - 23084)*u^25 + (-39537*z - 28194)*u^24 + (-43218*z - 33000)*u^23 + (-38634*z - 36786)*u^22 + (-30960*z - 38406)*u^21 + (-21519*z - 36489)*u^20 + (-9750*z - 29904)*u^19 + (4140*z - 18870)*u^18 + (17118*z - 6801)*u^17 + (22758*z - 326)*u^16 + (18612*z - 2220)*u^15 + (11232*z - 6180)*u^14 + (6540*z - 6777)*u^13 + (3654*z - 5403)*u^12 + (1944*z - 3342)*u^11 + (976*z - 1484)*u^10 + (456*z - 378)*u^9 + 195*z*u^8 + 74*z*u^7 + 24*z*u^6 + 6*z*u^5 + z*u^4)*v^3 + (-9*u^32 - 44*u^31 - 86*u^30 - 129*u^29 - 141*u^28 - 108*u^27 + (136*z + 190)*u^25 + (799*z + 475)*u^24 + (1848*z + 840)*u^23 + (2498*z + 1266)*u^22 + (2849*z + 1701)*u^21 + (2982*z + 2079)*u^20 + (2878*z + 2296)*u^19 + (2494*z + 2224)*u^18 + (1692*z + 1692)*u^17 + (630*z + 820)*u^16 + 304*u^15 + 336*u^14 + 312*u^13 + 243*u^12 + 162*u^11 + 82*u^10 + 28*u^9)*v^2 + (-u^32 - 2*u^31 - 4*u^30 - 6*u^29 - 9*u^28 - 12*u^27 - 16*u^26 + (16*z - 20)*u^25 + (47*z - 25)*u^24 + (34*z - 30)*u^23 + (20*z - 36)*u^22 + (7*z - 42)*u^21 + (-7*z - 49)*u^20 + (-20*z - 56)*u^19 + (-34*z - 64)*u^18 + (-47*z - 72)*u^17 + (-36*z - 56)*u^16 - 16*u^15 - 12*u^14 - 9*u^13 - 6*u^12 - 4*u^11 - 2*u^10 - u^9)*v + z*u^25 + (z + 1)*u^16;
q := u+1;
t := (v*u)/(u+1);
E := [(1+q)*t+(2-q),0,q*t^2+(1-q)*t,0,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [-t,t^2];
